use_codes.desc: ADASUVE IS A TYPICAL ANTIPSYCHOTIC INDICATED FOR THE ACUTE TREATMENT OF AGITATION ASSOCIATED WITH SCHIZOPHRENIA OR BIPOLAR I DISORDER IN ADULTS
